title: Lineara hypothesis (v0)
description: Declarative hypothesis artifact consumable by the v0 scoring harness. v0 supports a single shape: a partial sign->phoneme mapping. Tokens not listed in 'mapping' are left as-is during scoring.

name.description: Stable slug identifying this hypothesis. Must match the file basename.

description.description: Free-form prose describing the hypothesis and its rationale.

author.description: Agent or person attributing the hypothesis (e.g. 'pm-lineara').

created.description: ISO-8601 date the hypothesis was authored.

mapping.description: Sign-token -> phoneme-string map. Keys are corpus tokens (typically 'AB##' or 'A###'); empty mapping is permitted as a no-op identity hypothesis.
